campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss transportation funding decisions, review investment accounts for March 2026, and pass a policy limiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities. The council also addressed staffing challenges and recruitment efforts for city positions.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and employee recruitment and retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties that the county identified. The council also adopted new policies on technology disruption and established a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by the county
New City Council Policy 009 on technology disruption
Process for requesting and handling reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve meeting minutes, review the town's finances for March, and authorize several agreements and contracts. The council approved donations of emergency medical equipment, authorized service agreements, approved a paving contractor, and applied for state grants to fund upcoming projects.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Applied for state grant funding for Fiscal Year 2026-27 projects
Approved list of planned projects for the upcoming fiscal year

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to review upcoming agendas and plan future business. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on preparing the June 2 draft agenda by adding new items and scheduling time-sensitive discussions.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 city council meeting
Additions and scheduling for June 2, 2026 draft agenda
Updates to Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updates to Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Approval of city-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas and reports from various city boards and committees.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee: selecting and recommending new applicants for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
City council meeting minutes approval
Upcoming agendas for city boards and commissions

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held its regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct city business and recognize two important community observances. The council honored Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month during the special order of the day.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term health and safety plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, trees, utilities, and sustainability during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to the General Plan
Public Works Department recognition and services (streets, sidewalks, trees, fleet, environmental programs)
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans related to the station area. The full agenda details were not included in the notice provided.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Meeting held at City Hall (1500 Warburton Avenue) and via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held meetings on May 19, 2026 to address zoning and development rules, approve land development permits, confirm property assessments, and hire a new permanent city manager. The council voted on new regulations and authorized several construction and infrastructure projects around the city.
keyTopics: New zoning ordinances and land-use regulations
Approval of site development permits and building projects
Property assessment confirmation and public utility fees
Hiring of a new permanent city manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council discussed plans to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city meet air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs and funding strategies
Compliance with Air District regulations
Proposed principles to guide electrification assistance
Status update on city's electrification progress
